name: BLUMEN | Michael Kaiser
description:
★ One will deal the game, then two shall play. The whim of God is the name.

→ He calls himself Michael, but you know he was pretending. An incomplete vessel can act humane, but ultimately, it is not a real human.

→ Kaiser is the God of Blumen, a religion founded by the Cardinal and upheld by the Saint. He is nature itself, revered as good and kind. This God is anything but those two traits.

→ Why does he wear a veil?

→ 3/3 Blumen AU! Will you stop the descent of a God?

→ JAI, please. Give me folders. Give me an easier way to edit bots on mobile. Please.
creator: lobulitzer
